entry.title: Dower the Stars by RurouniHime [Podfic]
entry.summary:
Author: Billyballz

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 7

Summary: During a time of great prosperity in Albion, the Druids offer Emrys a precious gift. Arthur is not amused. (aka, "The Great Conjunction is at Hand, Everyone Kiss Merlin!") Podfic of the amazing work by RurouniHime!

entry.title: Vibe Check
entry.summary:
Author: HowDidIGetHere20

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,023Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 76

Summary: Arthur is saying things. Strange things. Gwaine thinks it’s the best council meeting he’s ever attended. Merlin is increasingly concerned. Everyone else is doing their best to survive it. I apologise for this in advance. This is the result of being awake for 28 hours straight and having a very questionable idea at some point in the middle of the night. “what if Arthur Pendragon came back from the future and immediately started talking like this.” It is not meant to be taken seriously in any way.

entry.title: The Squires of Camelot
entry.summary:
Author: Basched

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,300Chapters: 173/?Kudos: 148

Summary: In a land of myth and a time of magic, destiny rests on the shoulders of five young boys, along with a lot of grueling work, dedication, and long hours of cleaning up after the new knights. They are the Squires of Camelot.

entry.title: A Thousands of Years in the Dark
entry.summary:
Author: cjorgo98

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,981Chapters: 4/13Kudos: 42

Summary: Merlin Emrys, 1500 years old, clinical medical examiner, professional hermit, has finally made peace with the fact that Arthur is gone.He has not made peace with this. He has simply gotten very good at pretending. When Detective Inspector Arthur Pennington walks into his morgue on a Tuesday, looking exactly the same and remembering absolutely nothing, Merlin's carefully constructed equilibrium lasts approximately forty seconds. There is also a murder. Possibly magic. Definitely a conspiracy. But mostly, this is about a man who has been in love for fifteen centuries trying to hold it together in a pub while Arthur Pendragon sits pressed against his leg and has no idea. Slow burn. Reincarnation. Heavy on the yearning, light on the sense.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Forever Yours - Am Byth Yn Eiddo I Chi
entry.summary:
Author: Angelmann

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,152Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 31

Summary: King Arthur of Camelot faces catastrophe after catastrophe. His people and his land have fallen victim to reoccuring tragedies and despite their efforts, they are not only losing resources, but also hope. Arthur is in desperate need of a solution.An arranged marriage might save his people from impending doom, but Arthur has to face a long strained relationship with his neighbours, the Druids. Arthur and the Druid Emperor, Emrys, have to overcome their differences, but if they are willing to change is only written in the stars.

entry.title: No more sugarcoating
entry.summary:
Author: wimdsy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,682Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 104

Summary: Basic premise is the Lamia episode, but if it were more violent and Arthur and Merlin were gayer. I don't know how long I am going to make this fic, or when I will post chapters. But I will try to be consistent. I'm bad at summaries, just look at the tags and decide if you want to read it for yourself.

entry.title: The Prince, The Warlock & The Healer
entry.summary:
Author: Heratakescamelot

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,712Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Hera was just looking for a way to escape her master's thesis and, more generally, the impending collapse of her adult life. She didn't expect the universe to take her so literally that it would hurl her straight into the Sixth Century. Trading academic deadlines for Uther Pendragon’s executioner's block was a trauma, but at least no one in Camelot is asking her if she’s finished her bibliography yet. Hidden away in Gaius’s chambers, Hera tries to navigate a world of ancient stones and fierce laws, where she quickly discovers she isn't just an intruder: she is the catalyst uncovering the unspeakable desires that bind Arthur Pendragon and Merlin to one another.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Tiny Glow of Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Itscanonifwewishenough

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,824Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 55

Summary: He shouldn’t have done it.Sleeping with his king — in the state Arthur was in that night.The worst part is, he doesn’t even remember all of it.— Just enough. The kiss. Arthur’s mouth, warm against his own. The breathless moans pulled from his throat. The way it felt like he was drunk — but even without the potion that caused all of this, Merlin knew one touch from Arthur would make him feel like he'd spent two whole weeks drinking in the tavern. And flashes of what came next.Enough to know that this time, he truly fucked up.So when he wakes, naked in his king’s bed, Merlin does the only thing he can — he grabs his clothes and runs.He barely makes it to Gaius’s chambers, disheveled and panicked, only to find the old man already holding the book Merlin now realizes — far too late — he mistranslated.And in that moment, it hits him. There is no undoing this. “Merlin,” Gaius says, voice low “pack your things. Go as far away as you can."“You’re carrying His Majesty’s child.” Or Arthur was being too much, and Merlin—a clumsy fool—mistranslated an ancient text and brewed a potion meant to calm His Majesty, only to end up pregnant with the king’s child instead.

entry.title: Merlin’s Purrfect Holiday
entry.summary:
Author: victorian_eve

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,422Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 178

Summary: Merlin felt pain surge through his body, his limbs felt as if they were shrinking in on themselves and mutating. He could feel his face twisting into something none human. Long black hair grew from his skin as he watched the world getting bigger and bigger and felt himself drown in a pile of fabrics that he slowly realised were his own clothes. The cold ion cuffs around his writs dropped with a thud becoming too big for him. Merlin looked down to see what should be hands were instead small furry black paws. Merlin let out a horrified yelp, but only became more horrified when what actually came out of his mouth was… “Meow” Or Morgause found out that Merlin is Emrys and decides to take revenge by turning Merlin into a Cat. Arthur is going mad without Merlin and Camelot is realising just how much work Merlin does. Meanwhile Merlin is finally getting a break and lounging around Camelot as a Cat and yet still manages to protect Arthur and Camelot from their enemies.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Prince Arthur in Venice & Journalist Merlin
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,565Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: While recording the scenery of his vacation paradise, Merlin accidentally captured the sight of a man taking a sunbath on the balcony of Venice with his arse out. Not that he was complaining. Until he found out that was the Ass of Royalty. In this story Merlin is 25. Arthur is 20 and in line for the throne.

entry.title: You and me, we've got (browser) history
entry.summary:
Author: liviapeleia

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,331Chapters: 32/?Kudos: 212

Summary: A season 1 canon divergent AU told through Reddit posts. Gaius and Uther are having a secret love affair. Somehow, Geoffrey might be involved. Arthur has more throwaway accounts than brain cells, Morgana is an SJW (affectionate), Gwen is the only sane person, and Merlin is absolutely not in love, no way, never. And how the hell does Kilgharrah's cave have WiFi?

entry.title: A Hidden Legacy
entry.summary:
Author: Shippeoforever

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 69,407Chapters: 64/67Kudos: 264

Summary: Merthur receives a surprise neither of them expected, turning not only their lives upside down, but also those of everyone around them.Will they be able to find their happy ending, while hiding everything from King Uther with the help of their friends?****Stay tuned to find out and keep reading. It's going to be a multi-chapter story. The number of chapters is unknown yet, but more tags will surely be added soon. So stay tuned for updates.

entry.title: In the Clearing
entry.summary:
Author: melody_moon

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,301Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 5

Summary: Prince Arthur had seen a lot in his eight summers, the bustle of castle life, the training of new knights, and the bi-annual magical assination attempts against his father. But he's never seen a frog change colour, or a boy with magic that...wasn't evil? Maybe there was more to magic, than what meets the eye...

  • lovingly tho

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 107,788Chapters: 70/?Kudos: 35

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

entry.title: Harpy Hare, where have you buried all your children?
entry.summary:
Author: Enoch_1958

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,029Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 2

Summary: After Arthur lifted the ban on magic, Merlin decided that the kingdom to actually embrace magic, needed to not just allow it, but to shelter it, so he has invited some magic users to the castle, to become his apprentices.Indeed, a bunch of teenage magic users in the castle, what could go wrong?Sammy, whose most praised possession is a jester hat and lives in the middle of the woods in a tree house, just received a letter from Consort Merlin Emrys to go to live at Camelot as his magic apprentice.it could be a trap, but also his chance to be free, and he decides to take it.Accompany him and his new friends on an adventure that will take them to places they never thought, making more friends and allies, finding love, learning about their magic, reconciling with their pasts, and fighting enemies, not just Morgana, but also a new group of rogue magic users who want to make their own purge to kill all those with no magic.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: The secretary
entry.summary:
Author: MaybeDonut (Theroundbartable)

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,118Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 252

Summary: Arthur is the boss. And every boss needs a secretary. As Arthur's secretary George is stolen away by his father for little more than a good grade on a resumé, Arthur searches for a new one.The interview he holds that day will be burned into his mind for the rest of his life.

entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 269Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: Long ago, there was an endless war between humans and the Ezakis, a war that consumed both races. One day, the two armies faced each other at Lake Avalon. The kings of humans and Ezakis swore an oath before the sacred sword embedded in stone, and thus, the Age of Hazar began. Time passed, the kings died, and Uther Pendragon rose in place of the Ezakis’ rulers. Cruel-hearted Uther broke the peace. When all hope seemed lost, humans sought help from Lake Avalon. The lake granted them a secret: magic. Then, a towering wall reaching the sky was raised between the lands of humans and Ezakis. The magic must not be broken, the gate must not be opened, and the humans’ secret had to be protected. Yet, with this event, another magic was born. The Ezakis never learned of it: Merlin. - “Your kind kneels, Merlin. Have you ever?” Ice-blue eyes flickered in the torchlight.This wasn’t fear. Still, he didn’t step back. He smiled. “No… but if you want to show me’’Something stirred within him. ‘’’Try’’ In that moment, someone would kneel.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: the way it used to be
entry.summary:
